Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class EntitlementProcess

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.EntitlementProcess
public class EntitlementProcess extends Metadata

Java class for EntitlementProcess complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EntitlementProcess">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="SObjectType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="active" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="businessHours" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="entryStartDateField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="exitCriteriaBooleanFilter" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="exitCriteriaFilterItems" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FilterItem" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="exitCriteriaFormula" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isRecordTypeApplied" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isVersionDefault" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="milestones" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}EntitlementProcessMilestoneItem" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="versionMaster" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="versionNotes" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="versionNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getExitCriteriaFilterItems

      public List<FilterItem> getExitCriteriaFilterItems()
      Gets the value of the exitCriteriaFilterItems property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the exitCriteriaFilterItems property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getExitCriteriaFilterItems().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FilterItem

      Returns:
      The value of the exitCriteriaFilterItems property.

    • getExitCriteriaFormula

      public String getExitCriteriaFormula()
      Gets the value of the exitCriteriaFormula property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

    • getMilestones

      public List<EntitlementProcessMilestoneItem> getMilestones()
      Gets the value of the milestones property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the milestones property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getMilestones().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list EntitlementProcessMilestoneItem

      Returns:
      The value of the milestones property.
